data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of fraud detection, specifically for self-referrals and fake accounts. While the linked use case mentions that the fraud system flags suspicious self-referral patterns and blocks them, there is no concrete evidence or detailed description of how this detection mechanism operates or what specific criteria are used to identify fraudulent activity. This lack of detail indicates a gap in the requirement coverage for fraud detection, as the evidence does not confirm that the system effectively addresses the stated need.
gaps: No detailed evidence of the fraud detection mechanism for self-referrals and fake accounts.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add fraud detection verification endpoints
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the fraud detection system effectively identifies and blocks self-referrals and fake accounts.
